name: Ningbo Shenglong Automotive Powertrain System Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Shenglong Automotive Powertrain System Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automotive powertrain systems in China and internationally. It offers variable displacement oil pumps, tandem vacuum/variable displacement oil pumps, start/stop pumps, fixed displacement engine and transmission pumps, and high pressure DCT and brake system pumps; and assembly, traditional, and hollow camshafts, as well as aluminum die castings. The company is based in Ningbo, China.
